contribution.title: Telegram Memory Doctor
contribution.summary: Read-only local specialization path for diagnosing Spark memory delete integrity, active profile state, topic traces, dashboard summaries, and bounded repair recommendations.

governance.rollback_or_deprecation_rule: Disable Telegram natural-language Memory Doctor routing and keep CLI-only diagnosis if the route produces unsafe repair advice.

anti_drift.lineage_summary: Created from the Cem/Maya Telegram memory incident and verified with targeted Builder tests plus live local doctor probes.
anti_drift.ghost_improvement_check: Does not claim autonomous repair; only reports local prototype diagnostic readiness.
anti_drift.complexity_delta: Adds a small read-only doctor report and Telegram command routing; no new memory mutation authority.
known_limits: No full context-capsule blankness panel yet
Private memory traces keep this local_only
